extracted_claim.claim_summary: The customer is claiming the package seal is torn.

image_assessments.notes: A package is visible with red tamper-evident tape. A yellow sticky note with instructions is attached to the side of the box. The seal appears intact.

result.evidence_standard_met_reason: At least one image shows the claimed seal with sufficient clarity to evaluate the claim.
